title: AI Agent Sandbox - Fast, Secure & E2B-Compatible AI Runtime
source_name: follow-builders cloud fallback / keyword search / Anysearch
full_text:
AGENT SANDBOX
Runtime for AI agents to execute real-world tasks
Secure, programmable sandboxes for AI-generated code, browser workflows, computer use, and long-running tasks.
Get Started Pricing
Built for AI-native workloads
From agent execution to evals and RL
Support the full range of AI-native workloads—from coding agents and browser automation to evaluations, reinforcement learning environments, and long-running workflows.
01 Coding Agents
Run agents that write, execute, and iterate on code in isolated sandbox environments.
Learn more
02 Browser Automation
Power agents that browse the web, complete multi-step tasks, and extract structured results.
Learn more
03 Computer Use
Enable agents to interact with full desktop environments for GUI-based workflows and human-like actions.
Learn more
04 Evaluations & RL
Run repeatable evaluation and reinforcement learning workloads in controlled environments for testing, training, and iterative optimization.
Learn more
05 AI-Powered CI/CD
Run code review, test generation, and validation workflows in isolated sandboxes across your CI/CD pipelines.
Learn more
06 Long-running Workflows
Keep multi-step agent tasks running across extended sessions without breaking execution flow.
Learn more
Agent Sandbox
Fast startup. Strong isolation. Massive concurrency.
Launch sandbox instances in milliseconds, isolate every task, and scale to thousands of concurrent executions for real-world agent workloads.
Sub-second startup
Launch sandbox instances in under 200ms on average, optimized for bursty and high-frequency workloads.
Secure isolation
Each task runs in an isolated sandbox with system-level separation to reduce data leakage and unauthorized access risks.
High concurrency at scale
Run thousands of sandbox instances in parallel with consistently low latency for high-throughput agent workloads.
Try Now
Sandbox Capabilities
Core runtime capabilities
Everything agents need to execute code, interact with systems, and stay in control across real-world workflows.
001
Code Execution
Run Python, JavaScript, C++, and other languages in a secure sandbox.
002
External APIs
Allow agents to access external APIs and online data as needed.
003
Browser Use
Automate web navigation, form filling, and data extraction inside the sandbox.
004
Computer Use
Control full desktop environments for typing, clicking, scrolling, screenshots, and other GUI actions.
005
Persistent Sessions
Pause and resume long-running agent tasks without losing state.
006
Live Session View
View and stream sandbox sessions with VNC for interactive monitoring and debugging.
Pricing
Flexible, Usage-Based Pricing
Pay only for what you use — billed per second based on vCPU and memory. No plans, no lock-ins, no waste. Learn more
Sample Configuration
Usage Example
Estimated Cost
1 vCPU + 512 MiB RAM
Short-lived agent task (5 min)
~$0.0034
2 vCPU + 1 GiB RAM
Code execution job (1 hr)
~$0.0821
8 vCPU + 8 GiB RAM
Multi-agent or RL workload (1 hr)
~$0.3744

Built with Novita AI
Start building with Agent Sandbox
Get started with quickstarts, reusable templates, and isolated sandbox storage.
01 Quick Start
Launch your first sandbox in minutes.
Learn more
02 Templates
Define reusable sandbox environments once and use them across workloads.
Learn more
03 File system
Each sandbox includes an isolated filesystem for code, data, and session state.
Learn more
Enterprise
For advanced workloads that need higher resource limits, custom deployment regions, or dedicated infrastructure.
Contact Sales
Uptime SLA 99.95%
Max vCPUs per Sandbox Custom
Deployment Region Your Choice
Concurrent Instances Unlimited
Everything you need to build production AI.
200+ models, on-demand GPUs, and secure agent runtimes — unified under one API. Free to start, scales as you grow.
Get Started
